account.emailChangeSent: Check your new inbox for a confirmation link.
account.handleHint: Letters, digits, “_” and “-”. Must be unique.
account.title: Account

appearance.customColourHint: Pick any colour - buttons, highlights and the background tint follow it.
appearance.title: Appearance

data.body: Download everything Chordia stores about you, or permanently delete your account and all its data.
data.deleteAccountConfirm: Permanently delete your account and ALL your data — listening history, playlists, libraries, and friends? This cannot be undone.
data.deleteFailedBody: Could not delete your account right now. Please try again.
data.exportFailedBody: Could not export your data right now. Please try again.
data.title: Your data

downloads.serverNote: Music libraries themselves are added and organized on your Chordia library server, not here. Saving downloads to a custom folder (with your own path + organization layout) is coming to the desktop app.

thisDevice.description: Downloaded songs are stored on this device and play without a connection.
thisDevice.empty: Use the Download action on any track or album.
thisDevice.title: This device (browser storage)

downloads.title: Downloads

autoplay.desc: Keep playing similar music when the queue ends.
autoplay.label: Autoplay

crossfade.desc: Overlap and blend the end of each track into the next.
crossfade.label: Crossfade

preload.desc: Download upcoming queue tracks ahead of time for instant, gap-free playback. Higher uses more data.
preload.label: Preload next tracks

activityVisibility.desc: Who can see your recent plays and compare taste with you.
activityVisibility.label: Activity visibility

emailNotifications.desc: Get an email for friend requests and other account activity.
emailNotifications.label: Email notifications

scrobble.desc: Record what you play for your stats and Wrapped.
scrobble.label: Scrobble listens

sessions.body: Where you're signed in. Revoke any device you don't recognize.
sessions.signOutEverywhereConfirm: Sign out of all devices? You'll need to sign in again.
sessions.title: Devices & sessions

twoFactor.addHint: Add a second factor (an authenticator app) for extra account security.
twoFactor.enabledHint: 2FA is enabled. To turn it off, enter a current code or a recovery code.
twoFactor.recoveryIntro: 2FA is on. Save these recovery codes somewhere safe — each works once if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.scanHint: Scan this with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication

verifyEmail.body: We sent a verification link to your email. Didn't get it? Resend it below.
verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
